tagline: How to pronounce kubectl, nginx, GIF — with receipts.
problem: Engineers butcher project names daily — kub-cuttle, eng-inks, jraffic. Every standup, every conference talk, every Loom. There's no canonical answer because the names are jargon Webster doesn't cover.
solution: Pronounce is an 800+ entry community dictionary of how engineers actually say developer jargon — kubectl, nginx, GIF, JSON, Pydantic, Knative, Ghostty, wagmi, YAML — with cited sources (creator interviews, project FAQs, Wikipedia). One Bash CLI, one webapp, one Claude Code skill, one VS Code extension, zero dependencies.
why_now: AI coding agents (Claude / Cursor) hit the same wall: they read 'kubectl' and have no idea how to say it. A pronunciation MCP server fixes that in one install. Meanwhile remote-first work makes pronunciation drift worse — colleagues never hear each other say the words.
market_size: 30M+ developers worldwide (Stack Overflow 2024). Every one of them mispronounces at least one project name a week.
target_customer: Backend engineers, DevOps, SREs, AI coding agent users, conference speakers, dev-tool YouTubers.

features.title: 800+ sourced entries
features.description: Every word tagged with confidence (creator-clarified / consensus / contested) and a citable source URL.

features.title: Multi-reading audio
features.description: Contested words like GIF and SQL play 'jif … or: gif' — you hear the debate, not just one side.

features.title: Claude Code skill built-in
features.description: Ask Claude 'how do you pronounce X' — it returns audio + IPA + source, not a phonetic guess.

features.title: Zero dependencies
features.description: ~250 lines of Bash wrapping macOS `say`. No npm, no sudo, no surprises.

features.title: MCP server
features.description: Plug into Cursor / Claude / any MCP client. The agent gets pronunciation tools for free.

features.title: Community-owned
features.description: Dictionary is a TSV file. Open a PR. Get your favorite mispronounced project shipped.

features: CLI + webapp + MCP server + Claude Code skill + VS Code extension

team.name: alvin
team.bio: Engineer · built say-it after the 47th time someone said 'kub-cuttle' on a call.

ask.use_of_funds: Every star nudges more devs to contribute their favorite mispronounced project.

elevator_pitch: Pronounce — the dictionary engineers reach for when they realize they've been saying kubectl wrong for three years.
